title: A Seat Next to You
content: The bus was almost full when Ethan got on after work. He noticed one empty seat beside a young woman reading a novel. She looked up and smiled as he sat down. Her name was Lily, and they soon started talking about the book she was reading. The ride felt much shorter than usual because the conversation was so enjoyable. Before leaving the bus, Ethan asked if they could meet again someday. Lily happily agreed and wrote her phone number on a small piece of paper.
